'''Emdee''' was an [[MD-series medical droid]] who served the [[First Order]]. While loading crates aboard the [[shuttle]] [[Two-Seven-Oh-Five]] on a First Order [[space station]], Emdee was approached by [[Finn]] and [[Poe Dameron]], members of the [[Resistance]] who were attempting to escape the station disguised as medical workers. Emdee investigated the two "workers," but was electrocuted by the [[astromech droid]] [[BB-8]] and left in a crate.<ref name="Choose Your Destiny" />

{{Droid-stub}}
